ksa_text: Conduct program reviews and continuous improvement activities, including documenting lessons learned, analyzing feedback results, preparing assessment reports, testing and validating improvements, and auditing programs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Use feedback results (e.g., lesson learned) to identify opportunities to improve collection management efficiency and effectiveness.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices
AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Operations & Program Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.393) to justify inclusion for the Director of AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Director of AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Operations & Program Management is not a standard competency expectation for Director of AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.393) and edge-domain placement (Operations & Program Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
